trade_plans.entry_trigger: 1h candle close below $0.0123, or retest of $0.0125-$0.0126 and rejection
confluence_signals: Price-Volume Divergence (price rising with LOW volume)
trade_plans.win_rate_basis: Combination of 5 bearish exhaustion signals (overbought RSI, weak buying volume, negative funding dynamics, high L/S ratio) against a strong price trend, indicating a high probability of a short-term pullback or correction. Extreme Fear F&G index may trigger profit taking.
